The plant is further classified as belonging to the genus Paranomus and the family Proteaceae, and its classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Proteales, Family: Proteaceae, Genus: Paranomus, Species: P. marginatus.
